title: lonicera involucrata var. involucrata
intro: Lonicera involucrata var. involucrata, also known as the Beach Honeysuckle or Coast Honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lonicera genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lonicera involucrata var. involucrata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
